mapper.insert: INSERT INTO verification_tokens (user_id, token_type, new_value, token, expires_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{tokenType}, #{newValue}, #{token}, #{expiresAt})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM verification_tokens WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND token_type = #{tokenType}
DELETE FROM verification_tokens WHERE expires_at < NOW()
DELETE FROM verification_tokens WHERE new_value = #{newValue} AND token_type = #{tokenType}
